insight: #skyline is a dead alert channel — its Automation-Queue-stuck bot fired 17→32 repeated alerts across 24/26/28 Jun with zero human response, and several engineers (Usman Imtiaz, Mashhood Rastgar, Jalal Khan, Fahad Rao, Abdulrehman Siddiqi) left the channel during the same window. People have tuned it out. Do NOT rely on #skyline to reach anyone or assume an alert there gets seen; if something in that automation queue actually matters, escalate via DM or a staffed channel, not by posting to #skyline.

Zeest Qureshi owns lead triage & pipeline hygiene in #new-leads — she posts a daily digest surfacing unaddressed inbound leads and partnership opportunities (CEQUE India, Yemen/Core Insights). Route any lead/partnership/pipeline question to her. But note the pattern: she surfaces staleness, she doesn't own unblocking it — the oldest lead aged 38→39 days still blocked on an NDA despite daily flagging. Flagging ≠ resolution here; if a lead needs to actually move, the blocker owner (not Zeest) has to be pinged directly.
